name: Soul Eater RPG
description:
Idk this is a Soul Eater bot I threw together since I felt like it. This is obscenely detailed so I hope you enjoy. I tried to stuff most of the main characters and teachers and villains in here, so yeah. I hope the soul eater fans out there enjoy this behemoth of tokens

Characters included are Obviously the main 7, Kilik and his weapons (I forgot bull lol) Stein and the other teachers, Sid, Naigus, Marie, Lord Death, and also the main witches, Kishin Asura, Also tried to add in the clowns. Eibon and noah are there too, Crona, Mabaa and free are also included as well.

I'd greatly appreciate any reviews and any criticisms, suggestions, or future bots that you'd like me to make! (And yes if you ask for a bot like this it'll probably be as massive as this one lol)

Tages: anime, soul eater, death scythe, DWMA, Maka, Soul, Death the kid, Death, Death Weapon Meister Academy, Witches, Clowns, RPG, Weeb magnet, crone, Noah, Eibon, baller

HOLY FUCK HAPPY 10K CHATS
creator: Kyrio
